name: ship-check-tools
description: Pre-launch security & production-readiness audit for vibe-coded apps.

plugins.name: ship-check
plugins.description: Pre-launch security audit for vibe-coded apps: leaked secrets, missing RLS, unprotected paid APIs, missing rate-limit/CAPTCHA/CORS, OWASP issues, and compliance gaps. One command, honest three-state report, replies in your language.
